closed_world_scopes: applicant's claimed total months of physical presence in the United States during the five-year statutory period as declared on this worksheet
presence of an alternative spouse-track claim within this worksheet
sources.limitations: Structured worksheet prepared by or for the applicant; reflects only self-declared dates and totals for the stated statutory window. Does not independently verify travel history against border or government records. Cannot support closed-world absence for facts outside its stated scope (e.g., marital status, eligibility category determinations, presence facts outside the five-year window, or absences not disclosed by the applicant). Does not establish good moral character, residence, or other naturalization elements.
sources.title: Physical presence worksheet
